message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 158 progress comment

RusticMaple: ipc.rs end-to-end cx threading — 5 new handler
siblings (handle_pane_state / handle_set_pane_priority /
handle_clear_pane_priority / handle_request_with_context /
handle_client_with_context) + spawn site in run_with_context_with
_cx migrated to clone parent cx into each per-connection task.
IPC-server shutdown-cancel → registry lock acquire chain now
interruptible end-to-end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
